message:
fix(lock): Improve test reliability and PID validation

- Add Number.isFinite check for parsed PID in tryRemoveAbandonedLock
  to handle corrupt/invalid PID files gracefully
- Make concurrent lock contention test more reliable:
  - Increase retries (50) and decrease delay (50ms) for faster recovery
  - Decrease simulated work time (30ms) to reduce test duration
  - Add interval tracking to verify proper serialization
  - Assert no overlapping execution intervals

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
